nasb.text: So some of the people of Jerusalem were saying, “Is this not the man whom they are seeking to kill?

esv.text: Some of the people of Jerusalem therefore said, “Is not this the man whom they seek to kill?

cnv.text: 當時，有些耶路撒冷人說：“這不是他們想要殺的人嗎？

ccb.text: 有些住在耶路撒冷的人说：“这不是他们要杀的那个人吗？

csbs.text: 有些耶路撒冷的人说：“这不是他们想要杀的那个人吗？
